1.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
1.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

1.gl: a foot (as used in walking); by implication, a step; by euphemistically the pudenda
1.kj: [idiom] be able to endure, [idiom] according as, [idiom] after, [idiom] coming, [idiom] follow, (broken-)foot(-ed, -stool), [idiom] great toe, [idiom] haunt, [idiom] journey, leg,

1.gl: to place (in a very wide application)
1.kj: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

1.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south

1.kj: lord, master, owner. Compare also names beginning with 'Adoni-'.
1.dv: or (shortened) אָדֹן; from an unused root (meaning to rule);

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
2.kj: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out

2.gl: to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)
2.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put

2.gl: a branch (as extending); figuratively, a tribe; also a rod, whether for chastising (figuratively, correction), ruling (a sceptre), throwing (a lance), or walking (a staff; figuratively, a support of life, e.g. bread)
to tread down, i.e. subjugate; specifically, to crumble off
2.kj: (come to, make to) have dominion, prevail against, reign, (bear, make to) rule,(-r, over), take.

2.gl: strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)
2.kj: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.

2.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
2.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

3.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
3.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
3.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

3.gl: probably a force, whether of men, means or other resources; an army, wealth, virtue, valor, strength
3.kj: able, activity, ([phrase]) army, band of men (soldiers), company, (great) forces, goods, host, might, power, riches, strength, strong, substance, train, ([phrase]) valiant(-ly), va

3.gl: properly (abstractly) spontaneity, or (adjectively) spontaneous; also (concretely) a spontaneous or (by inference, in plural) abundant gift
3.kj: free(-will) offering, freely, plentiful, voluntary(-ily, offering), willing(-ly), offering).

3.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
3.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

3.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

3.kj: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.

4.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
4.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

4.gl: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)
4.kj: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.
4.dv: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

4.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
4.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

4.gl: properly, to sigh, i.e. breathe strongly; by implication, to be sorry, i.e. (in a favorable sense) to pity, console or (reflexively) rue; or (unfavorably) to avenge (oneself)
literally one officiating, a priest; also (by courtesy) an acting priest (although a layman)
4.kj: chief ruler, [idiom] own, priest, prince, principal officer.

4.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
4.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

5.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
5.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

5.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south
to dash asunder; by implication, to crush, smash or violently plunge; figuratively, to subdue or destroy
5.kj: dip, pierce (through), smite (through), strike through, wound.

5.gl: the Lord (used as a proper name of God only)

6.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)

6.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

6.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
6.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

6.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
6.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
6.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

6.gl: to dash asunder; by implication, to crush, smash or violently plunge; figuratively, to subdue or destroy
6.kj: dip, pierce (through), smite (through), strike through, wound.

7.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
7.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

7.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
7.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
7.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

7.gl: a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine)
7.dv: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from H5157 (נָחַל) in its original sense;

7.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
7.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).
[idiom] assuredly, banquet, [idiom] certainly, drink(-er, -ing), drunk ([idiom] -ard), surely. (Prop. intensive of H8248 (שָׁקָה).)
